####  BetaAgentsVersions
##### [List Agent Versions](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/agents/versions/list)
GET/v1/agents/{agent_id}/versions
####  BetaEnvironments
##### [Create Environment](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/create)
POST/v1/environments
##### [List Environments](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/list)
GET/v1/environments
##### [Get Environment](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/retrieve)
GET/v1/environments/{environment_id}
##### [Update Environment](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/update)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}
##### [Delete Environment](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/delete)
DELETE/v1/environments/{environment_id}
##### [Archive Environment](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/archive)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}/archive

BetaLimitedNetwork object { allow_mcp_servers, allow_package_managers, allowed_hosts, type } î‚š
Limited network access.

Network policy type
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_limited_network_params.type)
allow_mcp_servers: optional booleanî‚š
Permits outbound access to MCP server endpoints configured on the agent, beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_limited_network_params.allow_mcp_servers)
allow_package_managers: optional booleanî‚š
Permits outbound access to public package registries (PyPI, npm, etc.) beyond those listed in the `allowed_hosts` array. Defaults to `false`.

packages: optional [BetaPackagesParams](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_packages_params) { apt, cargo, gem, 4 more } î‚š
Specify packages (and optionally their versions) available in this environment.
When versioning, use the version semantics relevant for the package manager, e.g. for `pip` use `package==1.0.0`. You are responsible for validating the package and version exist. Unversioned installs the latest.

BetaPackagesParams object { apt, cargo, gem, 4 more } î‚š
Specify packages (and optionally their versions) available in this environment.
When versioning, use the version semantics relevant for the package manager, e.g. for `pip` use `package==1.0.0`. You are responsible for validating the package and version exist. Unversioned installs the latest.

####  BetaEnvironmentsWork
##### [Get Work Item](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/retrieve)
GET/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/{work_id}
##### [Poll for Work](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/poll)
GET/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/poll
##### [Acknowledge Work](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/ack)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/{work_id}/ack
##### [Record Heartbeat](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/heartbeat)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/{work_id}/heartbeat
##### [Stop Work](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/stop)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/{work_id}/stop
##### [List Work Items](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/list)
GET/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work
##### [Update Work Item](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/update)
POST/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/{work_id}
##### [Get Queue Statistics](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/environments/work/stats)
GET/v1/environments/{environment_id}/work/stats
##### ModelsExpand Collapse 
BetaSelfHostedWork object { id, acknowledged_at, created_at, 9 more } î‚š
Work resource representing a unit of work in a self-hosted environment.
Work items are queued when sessions are created or when long-dormant sessions receive new messages. The environment worker polls for work to execute in a self-hosted sandbox.
Work identifier (e.g., 'work_...')
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.id)
acknowledged_at: stringî‚š
RFC 3339 timestamp when the work item was acknowledged and assigned to a self-hosted sandbox
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.acknowledged_at)
created_at: stringî‚š
RFC 3339 timestamp when work was created
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.created_at)
data: [BetaSessionWorkData](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_session_work_data) { id, type } î‚š
The actual work to be performed
Session identifier (e.g., 'session_...')
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.data%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.environments.work.id)
type: "session"î‚š
Type of work data
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.data%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.environments.work.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.data)
environment_id: stringî‚š
Environment identifier this work belongs to (e.g., `env_...`)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.environment_id)
latest_heartbeat_at: stringî‚š
RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent heartbeat
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.latest_heartbeat_at)
metadata: map[string]î‚š
User-provided metadata key-value pairs associated with this work item
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.metadata)
started_at: stringî‚š
RFC 3339 timestamp when work execution started
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work.started_at)

Current state of the work item

BetaSelfHostedWorkQueueStats object { depth, oldest_queued_at, pending, 2 more } î‚š
Statistics about the work queue for an environment.
Uses Redis Stream consumer group metrics for O(1) queries.
depth: numberî‚š
Number of work items waiting to be picked up (lag from consumer group)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work_queue_stats.depth)
oldest_queued_at: stringî‚š
RFC 3339 timestamp of oldest item in the work stream (includes both queued and pending items), null if stream empty
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_self_hosted_work_queue_stats.oldest_queued_at)
pending: numberî‚š
Number of work items being processed (polled but not acknowledged)

BetaSessionWorkData object { id, type } î‚š
Work data for session work items.

Type of work data

####  BetaSessions
##### [Create Session](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/create)
POST/v1/sessions
##### [List Sessions](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/list)
GET/v1/sessions
##### [Get Session](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/retrieve)
GET/v1/sessions/{session_id}
##### [Update Session](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/update)
POST/v1/sessions/{session_id}
##### [Delete Session](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/delete)
DELETE/v1/sessions/{session_id}
##### [Archive Session](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/archive)
POST/v1/sessions/{session_id}/archive

BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentParams object { agents, type } î‚š
A coordinator topology: the session's primary thread orchestrates work by spawning session threads, each running an agent drawn from the `agents` roster.
agents: array of [BetaManagedAgentsMultiagentRosterEntryParams](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_multiagent_roster_entry_params)î‚š
Agents the coordinator may spawn as session threads. 1â€“20 entries. Each entry is an agent ID string, a versioned `{"type":"agent","id","version"}` reference, or `{"type":"self"}` to allow recursive self-invocation. Entries must reference distinct agents (after resolving `self` and string forms); at most one `self`. Referenced agents must exist, must not be archived, and must not themselves have `multiagent` set (depth limit 1).
stringî‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_multiagent_roster_entry_params%5B0%5D)

version: optional numberî‚š

Evaluation state for a single outcome defined via a define_outcome event.

What the agent should produce.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.description)
explanation: stringî‚š
Grader's verdict text from the most recent evaluation. For satisfied, explains why criteria are met; for needs_revision (intermediate), what's missing; for failed, why unrecoverable.

Server-generated outc_ ID for this outcome.

Current evaluation state. `pending` before the agent begins work; `running` while producing or revising; `evaluating` while the grader scores; `satisfied`/`max_iterations_reached`/`failed`/`interrupted` are terminal.

outcome_evaluations: array of [BetaManagedAgentsOutcomeEvaluationResource](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource) { completed_at, description, explanation, 4 more } î‚š
Per-outcome evaluation state. One entry per define_outcome event sent to the session.
completed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.completed_at)
description: stringî‚š
What the agent should produce.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.description)
explanation: stringî‚š
Grader's verdict text from the most recent evaluation. For satisfied, explains why criteria are met; for needs_revision (intermediate), what's missing; for failed, why unrecoverable.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.explanation)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle the outcome is currently on.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.iteration)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
Server-generated outc_ ID for this outcome.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.outcome_id)
result: stringî‚š
Current evaluation state. `pending` before the agent begins work; `running` while producing or revising; `evaluating` while the grader scores; `satisfied`/`max_iterations_reached`/`failed`/`interrupted` are terminal.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_outcome_evaluation_resource.result)

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource object { memory_store_id, type, access, 4 more } î‚š
A memory store attached to an agent session.
memory_store_id: stringî‚š
The memory store ID (memstore_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.memory_store_id)
type: "memory_store"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.type)
access: optional "read_write" or "read_only"î‚š
Access mode for an attached memory store.
"read_write"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.access%5B0%5D)
"read_only"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.access%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.access)
description: optional stringî‚š
Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.description)
instructions: optional stringî‚š
Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.instructions)
mount_path: optional stringî‚š
Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.mount_path)
name: optional stringî‚š
Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource.name)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_memory_store_resource)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session.resources)

Timing statistics for a session.
active_seconds: optional numberî‚š
Cumulative time in seconds the session spent in running status. Excludes idle time.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session.stats%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.active_seconds)
duration_seconds: optional numberî‚š
Elapsed time since session creation in seconds. For terminated sessions, frozen at the final update.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session.stats%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.duration_seconds)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session.stats)

BetaManagedAgentsSessionAgentUpdate object { mcp_servers, tools } î‚š
Mid-session agent configuration update. Only `tools` and `mcp_servers` are updatable. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. To preserve existing entries, GET the session, modify the array, and POST it back.
mcp_servers: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsURLMCPServerParams](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_url_mcp_server_params) { name, type, url } î‚š
Replacement MCP server list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.
name: stringî‚š
Unique name for this server, referenced by mcp_toolset configurations. 1-255 characters.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_url_mcp_server_params.name)
type: "url"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_url_mcp_server_params.type)
url: stringî‚š
Endpoint URL for the MCP server.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_url_mcp_server_params.url)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_agent_update.mcp_servers)
tools: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_toolset20260401_params) { type, configs, default_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_mcp_toolset_params) { mcp_server_name, type, configs, default_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_custom_tool_params) { description, input_schema, name, type } î‚š
Replacement tool list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.
BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params object { type, configs, default_config } î‚š
Configuration for built-in agent tools. Use this to enable or disable groups of tools available to the agent.

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams object { description, input_schema, name, type } î‚š
A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.
description: stringî‚š
Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_custom_tool_params.description)

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed_at, type, 3 more } î‚š
Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.
Unique identifier for this event.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool_use_id, type, 4 more } î‚š
Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event.id)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event.tool_use_id)
type: "user.tool_result"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event.type)

####  BetaSessionsEvents
##### [List Events](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list)
GET/v1/sessions/{session_id}/events
##### [Send Events](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/send)
POST/v1/sessions/{session_id}/events
##### [Stream Events](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/stream)
GET/v1/sessions/{session_id}/events/stream
##### ModelsExpand Collapse 
BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } î‚š
Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.id)
input: map[unknown]î‚š
Input parameters for the tool call.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.input)
name: stringî‚š
Name of the custom tool being called.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.processed_at)
type: "agent.custom_tool_use"î‚š

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

Name of the MCP tool being used.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_mcp_tool_use_event.name)

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_mcp_tool_use_event.processed_at)
type: "agent.mcp_tool_use"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_mcp_tool_use_event.type)

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum
"allow"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_mcp_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B0%5D)
"ask"î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 4 more } î‚š
Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.id)
input: map[unknown]î‚š
Input parameters for the tool call.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.input)
name: stringî‚š
Name of the agent tool being used.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.processed_at)
type: "agent.tool_use"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.type)
evaluated_permission: optional "allow" or "ask" or "deny"î‚š
AgentEvaluatedPermission enum
"allow"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B0%5D)
"ask"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B1%5D)
"deny"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B2%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event)

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError object { message, retry_status, type } î‚š
The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests â€” out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.
message: stringî‚š
Human-readable error description.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_billing_error.message)
retry_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal) { type } î‚š
What the client should do next in response to this error.
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } î‚š
The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.
type: "retrying"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } î‚š
This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.
type: "exhausted"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted)

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

UserToolConfirmationResult enum
"allow"î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEventParams object { tool_use_id, type, content, is_error } î‚š
Parameters for providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event_params.tool_use_id)
type: "user.tool_result"î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } î‚š
Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.
content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block) { text, type } î‚š
System content blocks to append. Text-only.
text: stringî‚š
The text content.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block.text)
type: "text"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event_params.content)
type: "system.message"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event_params.type)

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed_at, session_thread_id } î‚š
An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.id)
type: "user.interrupt"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.type)
processed_at: optional stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event)
BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool_use_id, 4 more } î‚š
A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.id)
result: "allow" or "deny"î‚š
UserToolConfirmationResult enum
"allow"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B0%5D)
"deny"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.tool_use_id)
type: "user.tool_confirmation"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.type)
deny_message: optional stringî‚š
Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.deny_message)
processed_at: optional stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event)

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max_iterations, 4 more } î‚š
Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry_status, type } î‚š
An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.
message: stringî‚š
Human-readable error description.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.message)

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "user.interrupt"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.type)

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event)
BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool_use_id, 4 more } î‚š
A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.id)
result: "allow" or "deny"î‚š
UserToolConfirmationResult enum
"allow"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B0%5D)
"deny"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.tool_use_id)
type: "user.tool_confirmation"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.type)
deny_message: optional stringî‚š
Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.deny_message)
processed_at: optional stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event)

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } î‚š
Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.id)
input: map[unknown]î‚š
Input parameters for the tool call.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.input)
name: stringî‚š
Name of the custom tool being called.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.processed_at)
type: "agent.custom_tool_use"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.type)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event)

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum
"allow"î‚š

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B0%5D)
"ask"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B1%5D)
"deny"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission%5B2%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.evaluated_permission)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_use_event)
BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolResultEvent object { id, processed_at, tool_use_id, 3 more } î‚š
Event representing the result of an agent tool execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_result_event.id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_result_event.processed_at)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_result_event.tool_use_id)
type: "agent.tool_result"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_tool_result_event.type)

The result content returned by the tool.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_credential_host_unreachable_error.message)
retry_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal) { type } î‚š
What the client should do next in response to this error.
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } î‚š
The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.
type: "retrying"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } î‚š
This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.
type: "exhausted"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } î‚š
The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.
type: "terminal"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_credential_host_unreachable_error.retry_status)

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.
event_ids: array of stringî‚š
The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_created_event.session_thread_id)

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome_id, 2 more } î‚š
Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.id)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.iteration)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.processed_at)
type: "span.outcome_evaluation_start"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event)
BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } î‚š
Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal â€” no further evaluation cycles follow.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.id)
explanation: stringî‚š
Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.explanation)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.iteration)
outcome_evaluation_start_id: stringî‚š
The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_evaluation_start_id)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.processed_at)
result: stringî‚š
Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max_iterations_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet â€” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.result)
type: "span.outcome_evaluation_end"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.type)
usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_model_usage) { cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, input_tokens, 2 more } î‚š
Token usage for a single model request.
cache_creation_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_creation_input_tokens)
cache_read_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_read_input_tokens)
input_tokens: numberî‚š
Input tokens consumed by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.input_tokens)
output_tokens: numberî‚š
Output tokens generated by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.output_tokens)
speed: optional "standard" or "fast"î‚š
Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.
"standard"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed%5B0%5D)
"fast"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event)

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome_id, 2 more } î‚š
Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.
Unique identifier for this event.

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_ongoing_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max_iterations, 4 more } î‚š
Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

max_iterations: numberî‚š
Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome_id: stringî‚š
Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

A session thread has begun executing. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event.id)
agent_name: stringî‚š
Name of the agent the thread runs.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event.agent_name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: stringî‚š
Public sthr_ ID of the thread that started running.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event.session_thread_id)
type: "session.thread_status_running"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_running_event)
BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent object { id, agent_name, processed_at, 3 more } î‚š
A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.id)
agent_name: stringî‚š
Name of the agent the thread runs.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.agent_name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: stringî‚š
Public sthr_ ID of the thread that went idle.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.session_thread_id)
stop_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_end_turn) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action) { event_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_retries_exhausted) { type } î‚š
The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.
BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } î‚š
The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.
type: "end_turn"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_end_turn.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_end_turn)
BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.
event_ids: array of stringî‚š
The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids)
type: "requires_action"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action)
BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } î‚š
The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).
type: "retries_exhausted"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_retries_exhausted.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_retries_exhausted)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.stop_reason)
type: "session.thread_status_idle"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event)

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool_use_id, type, 4 more } î‚š
Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event.id)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_result_event.type)

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.
event_ids: array of stringî‚š
The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids)
type: "requires_action"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action)
BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent object { id, agent_name, processed_at, 2 more } î‚š
Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_created_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: stringî‚š
Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent object { id, agent_name, processed_at, 3 more } î‚š
A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.id)

Public sthr_ ID of the thread that went idle.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_idle_event.session_thread_id)
stop_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_end_turn) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action) { event_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_retries_exhausted) { type } î‚š
The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.
BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } î‚š
The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.
event_ids: array of stringî‚š
The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids)
type: "requires_action"î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } î‚š

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } î‚š
Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal â€” no further evaluation cycles follow.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.id)
explanation: stringî‚š
Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.explanation)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.iteration)
outcome_evaluation_start_id: stringî‚š
The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_evaluation_start_id)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.processed_at)
result: stringî‚š
Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max_iterations_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet â€” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.result)
type: "span.outcome_evaluation_end"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.type)
usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_model_usage) { cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, input_tokens, 2 more } î‚š
Token usage for a single model request.
cache_creation_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_creation_input_tokens)
cache_read_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_read_input_tokens)
input_tokens: numberî‚š
Input tokens consumed by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.input_tokens)
output_tokens: numberî‚š
Output tokens generated by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.output_tokens)
speed: optional "standard" or "fast"î‚š
Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.
"standard"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed%5B0%5D)
"fast"î‚š

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed)

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome_id, 2 more } î‚š
Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed_at, session_thread_id } î‚š
An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.id)
type: "user.interrupt"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.type)
processed_at: optional stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event)
BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool_use_id, 4 more } î‚š
A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.id)
result: "allow" or "deny"î‚š
UserToolConfirmationResult enum
"allow"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B0%5D)
"deny"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.result)
tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.tool_use_id)
type: "user.tool_confirmation"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.type)
deny_message: optional stringî‚š
Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.deny_message)
processed_at: optional stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_tool_confirmation_event)
BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom_tool_use_id, type, 4 more } î‚š
Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_custom_tool_result_event.id)
custom_tool_use_id: stringî‚š
The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_custom_tool_result_event.custom_tool_use_id)
type: "user.custom_tool_result"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_custom_tool_result_event.type)
content: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_text_block) { text, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsImageBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_image_block) { source, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsDocumentBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_document_block) { source, type, context, title }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_search_result_block) { citations, content, source, 2 more } î‚š

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_custom_tool_result_event)
BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } î‚š
Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.id)
input: map[unknown]î‚š
Input parameters for the tool call.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.input)
name: stringî‚š
Name of the custom tool being called.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.name)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.processed_at)
type: "agent.custom_tool_use"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.type)
session_thread_id: optional stringî‚š
When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event.session_thread_id)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_agent_custom_tool_use_event)

Indicates the agent is making forward progress via extended thinking. A progress signal, not a content carrier.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent object { id, error, processed_at, type } î‚š
An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_error_event.id)
error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error) { message, retry_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_model_overloaded_error) { message, retry_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_model_rate_limited_error) { message, retry_status, type }  or 5 moreî‚š
An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.
BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry_status, type } î‚š
An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.
message: stringî‚š
Human-readable error description.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.message)
retry_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal) { type } î‚š
What the client should do next in response to this error.
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } î‚š
The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.
type: "retrying"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } î‚š
This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.
type: "exhausted"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } î‚š
The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.
type: "terminal"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.retry_status)
type: "unknown_error"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error)
BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError object { message, retry_status, type } î‚š
The model is currently overloaded. Emitted after automatic retries are exhausted.
message: stringî‚š

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.id)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.iteration)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.processed_at)
type: "span.outcome_evaluation_start"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_start_event)
BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } î‚š
Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal â€” no further evaluation cycles follow.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.id)
explanation: stringî‚š
Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.explanation)
iteration: numberî‚š
0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.iteration)
outcome_evaluation_start_id: stringî‚š
The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_evaluation_start_id)
outcome_id: stringî‚š
The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.outcome_id)
processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.processed_at)
result: stringî‚š
Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max_iterations_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet â€” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.result)
type: "span.outcome_evaluation_end"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.type)
usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_model_usage) { cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, input_tokens, 2 more } î‚š
Token usage for a single model request.
cache_creation_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_creation_input_tokens)
cache_read_input_tokens: numberî‚š
Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.cache_read_input_tokens)
input_tokens: numberî‚š
Input tokens consumed by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.input_tokens)
output_tokens: numberî‚š
Output tokens generated by this request.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.output_tokens)
speed: optional "standard" or "fast"î‚š
Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.
"standard"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed%5B0%5D)
"fast"î‚š

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20beta.sessions.events.speed)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event.usage)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_end_event)

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome_id, 2 more } î‚š
Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.
Unique identifier for this event.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_span_outcome_evaluation_ongoing_event.outcome_id)

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

max_iterations: numberî‚š
Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome_id: stringî‚š

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

Public sthr_ ID of the thread that went idle.

stop_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_end_turn) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action) { event_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_retries_exhausted) { type } î‚š
The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event_ids, type } î‚š
The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRescheduledEvent object { id, agent_name, processed_at, 2 more } î‚š
A session thread hit a transient error and is retrying automatically. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_rescheduled_event.id)
agent_name: stringî‚š
Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed_at: stringî‚š
A timestamp in RFC 3339 format
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_rescheduled_event.processed_at)
session_thread_id: stringî‚š
Public sthr_ ID of the thread that is retrying.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_session_thread_status_rescheduled_event)
BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed_at, type, 3 more } î‚š
Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.
Unique identifier for this event.

processed_at: stringî‚š

The text content.

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event.type)

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event.processed_at)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_stream_session_events)
BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } î‚š
Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.
content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block) { text, type } î‚š
System content blocks to append. Text-only.
text: stringî‚š
The text content.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block.text)
type: "text"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_content_block.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event_params.content)
type: "system.message"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event_params.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_system_message_event_params)

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry_status, type } î‚š
An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.
message: stringî‚š
Human-readable error description.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.message)
retry_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal) { type } î‚š
What the client should do next in response to this error.
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } î‚š
The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.
type: "retrying"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_retrying)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } î‚š
This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.
type: "exhausted"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_exhausted)
BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } î‚š
The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.
type: "terminal"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_retry_status_terminal)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.retry_status)
type: "unknown_error"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_unknown_error)

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max_iterations, 4 more } î‚š
Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed_at, session_thread_id } î‚š
An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.
Unique identifier for this event.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.id)
type: "user.interrupt"î‚š
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta#beta_managed_agents_user_interrupt_event.type)
